blended.narrative: Devil's Head is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 776 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
